overview_summary: All three neighboring landowners have an "unknown" stance on the development, as none have any public record of supporting or opposing such projects. Likewise, none hold public office or major community roles, so there are no high-influence neighbors in this group.

neighbors.name: Starr Properties
neighbors.claims: Polk County’s public records list "Starr Properties" as the owner of parcel 15815, indicating this is a business entity rather than an individual resident [Polk County Tax Assessor](https://polkga.org/departments/tax_assessor/index.php).

approach_recommendations.engage: Coordinate with this corporate landowner through official channels, as standard for an LLC.

neighbors.name: Marty L. Waddell & Angie E. Waddell
neighbors.claims: Marty Waddell, a 58-year-old Aragon (Polk County) resident, passed away suddenly on October 12, 2020 [Alvis Miller Funeral Home](https://www.alvismillerfuneralhome.com/obituaries/marty-waddell). Neither Marty nor his wife Angie have any record of holding local office or speaking publicly on development issues [Polk County Board of Commissioners](https://www.polkga.org/government/board_of_commissioners/index.php).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage Angie Waddell via a mutual local contact, emphasizing respect for their family’s long-standing local ties and listening to any concerns she may have.

neighbors.name: Jeremy Roberson
neighbors.claims: The Roberson family name is reflected in a rural road near Rockmart (Roberson Rd), where one tract spans about 34.5 acres [Redfin](https://www.redfin.com/GA/Rockmart/214-Roberson-Rd-30153/home/24512844). No evidence was found of Jeremy Roberson holding any public position or voicing opinions on local development in official forums [Polk County Board of Commissioners](https://www.polkga.org/government/board_of_commissioners/index.php).

approach_recommendations.engage: Use a neighborly one-on-one approach with Jeremy Roberson, ensuring open communication. Be prepared to address common concerns about property impacts and show willingness to listen to his questions.
